headline: Netflix's Q3 Earnings Report Could Lead to $21.5 Billion Swing in Market Value
summary: Earnings focus on Thurs, Benzinga-selected slate: industrial engines, logistics real estate, streaming, medical devices. Options market offers snapshot of volatility. UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH) is the marquee name. Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) reports before opening bell, GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) reports after bell.

headline: Prologis Q2 Preview: Can Healthy Leasing Support Earnings?
summary: PLD is set to report Q2 results on July 16 as investors watch whether strong leasing, rent growth and development momentum can support higher revenues and FFO.
